validated_commands.format: python3 -m uv run black . && python3 -m uv run isort .
validated_commands.notes: uv is not on PATH in CI; use 'pip install uv --break-system-packages' then 'python3 -m uv'

coverage_baseline.notes: All 2157 tests pass as of 2026-03-20. PRs #221, #291, #317, #333, #351 not yet merged. New PR for runtime-manager created 2026-03-20.

yaml_pollution_note: Running tests with --cov causes PyYAML global state corruption from some earlier test. Affects parse_skill_file and parse_primitive_file calls when run in full suite with coverage. Not a new issue. Tests pass without --cov.
ansi_strip_note: 7 ANSI failures fully resolved as of 2026-03-16 (likely fixed in or around PR #313). No longer a concern.
config_bug_note: set_auto_integrate/get_auto_integrate were missing from apm_cli/config.py - fixed in PR 2026-03-19. apm config set/get auto-integrate would throw ImportError at runtime without this fix.

testing_backlog.notes: PR submitted 2026-03-19. 23 tests, 22%->100%. Also fixed missing set_auto_integrate/get_auto_integrate functions.
PR #221 open. Remaining uncovered: display/formatting paths (264-333, 436-518, 759-801) - require distributed compiler stack
PR submitted 2026-03-20. 53 tests, 49%->90% for manager.py, 20%->92% for commands/runtime.py

open_test_assist_prs.title: test: add unit tests for AgentsCompiler (65%->82%)
fix(tests): strip ANSI codes before plain-text assertions
tests: improve coverage for security scanner and audit command
[Test Improver] test: add unit tests for utils/console.py (58% → 90%)
test: add unit tests for config command (22%->100%) + fix missing functions
[Test Improver] test: add unit tests for RuntimeManager and runtime CLI (20%->92%, 49%->90%)

completed_work.description: Task3: added 53 tests for runtime/manager.py (49%->90%) and commands/runtime.py (20%->92%). Total: 2157 passing (was 2104).

Task4: verified all 5 open TI PRs have passing CI. Task2: identified config.py bug (missing set/get_auto_integrate). Task3: added 23 tests for commands/config.py (22%->100%), fixed ImportError bug. Total: 2123 passing.
Added 33 tests for utils/console.py. Coverage: 58%->90% (+32pp). Full suite: 2047 passing.
